channel.title: +अध्ययन-कण्ठस्थी-कराणादि on वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +अध्ययन-कण्ठस्थी-कराणादि on वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: अध्ययनम्
item.description:
उच्चारणानूच्चारणक्रमेणैव शब्द-राशि-ग्रहणम् अध्ययनम् उच्यते।

अध्ययन-काले केचिद् बालाः स्वापं यन्ति। तत्र मोहितः -

अल्पाध्यापनं (१५ निमिषेभ्यः एकवारं, पुनः ५ निमिषेभ्यः विरामः, पुनरेवम्) मध्ये मध्ये रुचिकरविषयानां चर्चनम्, तदेव… एवम् एव मासेभ्यः कर्त्तव्यम्..

item.title: कण्ठस्थी-करणम्
item.description:
विजयोक्ता प्रक्रिया

Standard way of teaching in the top vedic schools is as follows:

Each day 1x teaching + 19x self study.
Volume of lesson is 50 panchashats.
Anandhyayana dinas are Amavasya/Paurnami, prathamA, aShThamI, chaturdashI.
Classic style - 1 santhai per day for 10 days. Guru recites. Shishya repeats twice.
Teaching pauses on anadhyayana but self study continues.

Paksha 1

  • Lesson 5 instruction
  • Lesson 4 10x self-study
  • Lesson 3 5x self-study
  • Lesson 2 3x self-study
  • Lesson 1 1x self-study - expected to have memorized

Paksha 2

item.title: परीक्षा
item.description:
राजमहेन्द्रपुरम्

The rajamundhry veda pariksha was started in the year 1937 by the Hota family (street is named after them in Rajamundhry called Hota Vari street). Shri Mahaperiyava had done chaaturmaasyam in that house where the exams were held for a long time. Now its held in datta kshetram. The “patta” carries immense value in Andhra and other places due to the severity of the exam. Only those who hold the “patta” are allowed to participate in the various veda sadas held across different places in Andhra.

item.title: प्राधान्य-भेदाः
item.description:
प्राधान्य-केन्द्र-विवेकः

Excessive focus on memorization turns adhyeta-s into glorified autistic tape-recorders.

Similarly focus on vikRti-pATha-s (beyond krama) is unproductive. There are more important uses for one’s intellect.

सम्प्रदाय-भेदः

mAdhva-s do widespread vedAdhyayana as well - minus memorization. That approach seems more practicable in the current era.

श्रीवैष्णवेषु

Not denying adhyayana per capita of SV population is less than half that of Smartas of a good quality, but is not to a doomer 10-20 proper adhyayi level.
